features: COMPLETE SET: 230 pairs of hair accessories including 100 multicoloured elastic bands, 100 pink elastic bands, 10 satin bow hair ties, and 10 pearl-decorated butterfly clips
ELASTIC BANDS: Soft and stretchy hair bands in vibrant rainbow colours and pink shades, perfect for daily styling and secure hold
BOW DETAILS: 20 delicate satin bows in pretty pastel shades including white, pink, and peach, attached to gentle-grip elastic bands
BUTTERFLY DESIGN: 10 elegant butterfly clips adorned with faux pearl detailing, available in soft pastel colours including pink, purple, and blue
VERSATILE STYLING: Perfect for creating various hairstyles including ponytails, pigtails, braids, and decorative accents suitable for all hair types
description: Product Description Transform your little one's hair styling routine with this delightful 230-piece hair accessories set. The collection includes 200 vibrant multicoloured elastic hair bands in pastel and bright shades, perfect for secure and comfortable ponytails. Additionally, you'll find 20 charming bow accessories and 10 elegant butterfly-shaped clips adorned with pearl-like embellishments, adding a touch of whimsy to any hairstyle. The butterfly clips feature soft, pastel colours including pink, purple, and blue, complementing a variety of outfits. Each piece is thoughtfully designed with gentle materials suitable for children's hair, whilst the elastic bands provide a secure hold without pulling or tugging. The set comes beautifully presented in a pink storage box, making it both practical for organisation and perfect as a gift. Whether it's for everyday wear, special occasions, or playtime dress-up, this comprehensive set offers versatile styling options for young fashion enthusiasts.
